PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 09, 2018 is admitted to probate. Laura Ughetta is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for January 24, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Maloney: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
